themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe are advancing 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social benefits, housing, and public services. This theme is particularly strong in Spain, France, and Italy, where Vox, Rassemblement National, and Lega are either implementing or advocating for such measures in coalition governments or electoral campaigns.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox secures key portfolios in Aragón's new government, implementing 'national priority' in social welfare, agriculture, and environment policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Jordan Bardella proposes restricting family allowances and social housing to French nationals if RN wins the 2027 presidential election.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia push for 'national priority' in regional governments, clashing with EU norms and opposition parties.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK plans to place migrant detention centers in Green Party-controlled areas, reflecting a 'national priority' stance on immigration.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS's policies on constitutional reform and national sovereignty echo 'national priority' rhetoric, though framed in domestic terms.

themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media across multiple countries are intensely focused on the U.S.-Iran conflict under Trump's administration. Coverage spans military strategies, diplomatic tensions, and the economic fallout of the war, with parallel reactions from European allies and critics.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump reviews Iran's peace proposal but expresses skepticism, while announcing new military operations like 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's Nigel Farage ties domestic immigration policies to global conflicts, including the U.S.-Iran war, framing it as a broader cultural and security issue.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN criticizes U.S. policies on Iran and the Middle East, positioning itself as a counterbalance to American influence in Europe.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Italian PM Meloni faces pressure over Italy's stance on the U.S.-Iran war, with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio visiting Rome to ease tensions.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox links Spain's domestic policies to global conflicts, criticizing the EU's stance on Iran and advocating for a more nationalist foreign policy.

themes.title: Meloni’s government longevity sparks cross-national debate
themes.blurb: Giorgia Meloni's government in Italy has become the second-longest in the country's history, sparking debates across Europe about the stability, effectiveness, and ideological direction of far-right governance. This theme resonates in Germany, Hungary, and France, where similar parties are either in power or gaining influence.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government reaches 1,288 days in power, becoming Italy's second-longest, sparking debates about its achievements and failures.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD uses Meloni's longevity as a model for far-right governance, advocating for similar stability and policy shifts in Germany.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Hungary's opposition victory over Fidesz is framed as a potential shift away from long-term far-right governance, with comparisons to Meloni's Italy.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN positions itself as a viable alternative to Macron, using Meloni's success as a blueprint for far-right governance in France.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS debates constitutional reforms, drawing parallels to Meloni's governance model and its implications for Poland's political future.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Far-right parties are making significant gains in polls and elections across Europe, challenging traditional center-right and center-left parties. This theme is evident in Germany, France, Sweden, and Norway, where far-right parties are either leading polls or securing key electoral victories.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: AfD leads polls in Thuringia and Saxony-Anhalt, positioning itself as a major force in Germany's upcoming elections.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: RN leads polls for the 2027 French presidential election, with Jordan Bardella and Marine Le Pen as top candidates.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD's influence in Sweden's government grows, with the party pushing for stricter immigration policies and challenging the center-right coalition.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: FrP gains traction in Norway's local elections, capitalizing on anti-immigration sentiment and economic discontent.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK surges in UK polls, challenging Labour and Conservatives in local elections and positioning itself as a major political force.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric and policies are increasingly linked to political violence, both in the U.S. and Europe. This theme is evident in the rise of assassination attempts, protests, and threats against political figures, as well as the normalization of violent language in political discourse.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump faces multiple assassination attempts, while his rhetoric is linked to political violence and threats against opponents.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Reform UK's Nigel Farage reports a petrol bomb attack on his home, highlighting the risks of far-right political engagement.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Lega and Fratelli d'Italia face protests and threats, with far-right rhetoric fueling tensions in Italy's political landscape.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: SD's rise in Sweden is accompanied by increased political violence, including protests and threats against opponents.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS faces political violence and threats, with President Nawrocki's security heightened amid rising tensions.
